flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Dominican University of California rose 65% between 2007 and 2010 ($11.0k → $18.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Dominican University of California rose 16% between 2007 and 2010 ($30.6k → $35.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Dominican University of California fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
